svg.text: ① Composed, not custom — health1 configures the 1 Suite (service1 + finance1) for healthcare; built fast on proven products.
② Safety-first — clinical decision-support only; a qualified human decides; never autonomous diagnosis or treatment.
③ Grounded & cited — every answer ties to the record or approved sources; no hallucinated medical facts.
④ Private by design — PHI minimized, consent-based, India DPDP / DISHA + HIPAA-style; immutable audit.
⑤ Assured before go-live — assure1's independent clinical & privacy evals issue a Trust Mark; run1 keeps it reliable.
⑥ Outcome-led — access, cost, denials & clinician time, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
